title.ar: دعاء لقاء العدو و ذي السلطان
title.en: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.

items.arabicText: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَجْعَلُكَ فِي نُحُورِهِم، وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شُرُورِهِمْ)).

translations.en: (O Allah, we place You before them and we take refuge in You from their evil.)

items.arabicText: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ عَضُدِي، وَأَنْتَ نَصِيرِي، بِكَ أَحُولُ وَبِكَ أَصُولُ، وَبِكَ أُقاتِلُ)).

translations.en: (O Allah, You are my supporter and You are my helper, by You I move and by You I attack and by You I battle.)
(Allah is sufficient for us, and how fine a trustee (He is).)
